steps.title: Find the median position
steps.content: The data is already ordered: 2, 2, 2, 3, 4, 4, 11. With 7 values (odd), the median is the middle value at position $$\frac{7+1}{2} = 4$$.

steps.title: Identify the middle value
steps.content:
Counting to position 4 in the ordered list:
Position 1: 2
Position 2: 2
Position 3: 2
Position 4: 3
The median is 3. That matches choice B — B is correct.
